description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Python that runs on every push and pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job with concurrency control to cancel in-progress runs for the same workflow and head ref. Check out the repository, set up Python, and then for auxiliary scripts and search engine components, install tools, gather Python files, lint code with pyflakes and bandit, format code with pycodestyle and isort, and build code with compileall.
